---
name: Feature request
about: A new tool or a new behavior on an existing tool
labels: enhancement
---

**What would the tool do?**
<!-- Who is it for, what problem does it solve, what's the input -> output flow -->

**Existing similar tool (optional)**
<!-- e.g. "nftbiker has a tool that does X" — a working reference helps a lot -->

**Why this over alternatives**
<!-- What's the gap? -->

**Sketch (optional)**
<!-- Rough UI in text or pseudo-mockup -->

**On-chain notes (optional)**
<!-- Contract addresses, entrypoints, gotchas -->
